description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a large rectangular plot with manicured lawns and a driveway leading to the entrance. The building features a flat roof and clean, geometric lines, with a central entrance flanked by large windows that allow ample natural light. The property is surrounded by a low fence and includes a paved driveway that curves around the front, providing access for vehicles. Sparse landscaping with small trees and shrubs lines the perimeter and the approach to the house. The rear of the bungalow appears to have a patio or pool area, visible as a blue rectangular feature adjacent to the building. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the surrounding green space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious lawn with a curved driveway and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central pathway, and driveway with trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large windows, and the blue patio or pool area at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back lawn, rear entrance, and a clearer view of the patio or pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway curve, side windows, and the building's elongated shape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and side facades
